## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss ongoing collaboration and recent changes at Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ashley (marketing leader at Prophecy) is resigning; her last day is next Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Cody will report to Will, a new contractor with product-led growth background](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Prophecy's marketing team is undergoing significant changes, with reduced headcount and reassessment of resources](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [GrowthX's ongoing relationship with Prophecy is uncertain, pending new leadership's evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

## Topics

### Leadership Changes at Prophecy

  - [Ashley, a marketing leader at Prophecy, is resigning with her last day next Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Cody will report to Will, a new contractor with product-led growth background](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [Will has Raj's ear and is assessing current resources and future needs](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Uncertainty about Will's long-term role (contract ends in 6-8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Marketing team off-site planned for next Monday and Tuesday to stabilize and align the team](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

### Resource Assessment and Strategy

  - [Reassessing available resources and future needs with reduced headcount](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [No current plans to expand marketing team headcount](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Will's approach to content and SEO aligns more with Cody's views](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Upcoming needs for video editing capabilities and other tasks beyond current capacity](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Will to make cases for spending or not spending on various resources](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Status

  - [Current plan is to let GrowthX contract run out (ends December 2nd)](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Opportunity to showcase GrowthX's broader capabilities beyond content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Proposal to involve Will in future calls to discuss potential ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [GrowthX offers to help with research and ideation based on new context from upcoming off-site](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

### Industry Trends and Career Reflections

  - [Discussion on CMO tenure in startups (average 12-18 months, \~1.3 years)](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Shift towards revenue titles and go-to-market structures in SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Reflections on unique skill sets and backgrounds of successful revenue leaders](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody to provide updates after the marketing team off-site next week](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Dedicate significant time in next week's meeting to discuss off-site outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Potentially schedule a call with Will to discuss GrowthX's capabilities and potential ongoing collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [GrowthX to remain available for research and ideation support as needed](https://fathom.video/share/Sixj2s85RmAbv6MBGnPs_wdt_SDzb6yR?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
